trades.reasoning: Top-scoring candidate (95) with RSI at 62.5 — ideal bullish zone with room to run before overbought — plus confirmed MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price above SMA-20; deploys idle cash in neutral market conditions.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted flat today with the S&P 500 up just 0.1% and NASDAQ unchanged — a quiet, directionless session. Despite the neutral tape, momentum screener produced three score-95 names; TBBB stands out as the cleanest setup with RSI in the optimal 55–70 range (not yet overbought) and all three bullish signals confirmed. With $1,100 in idle cash and four open slots, deploying into the highest-conviction name is the right call rather than holding cash in a low-risk-appetite market.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities finished essentially flat on Friday, with the S&P 500 eking out a 0.1% gain and the NASDAQ closing unchanged as investors paused after recent strong gains. Trading volume was lighter than average heading into the long weekend, and sector rotation — with money moving out of high-beta tech and into defensive names — kept the headline indices anchored near the flatline. In the absence of major catalysts, participants appear to be in a wait-and-see posture ahead of next week's economic data releases.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週五幾乎持平，標普500指數小漲0.1%，納指收盤幾無變動，市場在近期強勁升勢後出現短暫喘息。由於長假前夕成交量較平日偏淡，資金從高Beta科技股輪動至防禦性板塊，令大盤指數難以突破。在缺乏重大催化劑的情況下，投資者普遍採取觀望態度，靜候下週一系列經濟數據出爐。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks already trending upward, on the premise that assets moving in a strong direction tend to keep moving that way for a period. Technical indicators like RSI and MACD help identify when momentum is healthy (RSI 55–70) versus dangerously extended (RSI above 70), letting traders ride a trend without chasing an overheated move. Today's buy of TBBB is a textbook momentum entry — confirmed trend, not yet overbought.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略的核心邏輯是「強者恆強」：已在上升趨勢中的股票，往往會在一段時間內持續走強。技術指標如相對強弱指數（RSI）與MACD，可協助判斷動能是否健康（RSI介於55至70為理想區間）或已過度延伸（RSI高於70則需謹慎追高）。今日買入TBBB正是教科書式的動能進場——趨勢確立，尚未超買，勝率相對較高。
